# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Full-Order Model (FOM)

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [fom.fem_utils](fom.fem_utils.qmd#skrom.fom.fem_utils) | Finite element utilities for preconditioning, mesh operations, and nonlinear solving. |

## Reduced-Order Model (ROM)

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [rom.bilinear_form_rom](rom.bilinear_form_rom.qmd#skrom.rom.bilinear_form_rom) | Implements reduced-order bilinear form assembly for full-order to reduced-order transformations. |
| [rom.linear_form_rom](rom.linear_form_rom.qmd#skrom.rom.linear_form_rom) | Implements reduced-order linear form assembly for full-order to reduced-order transformations. |
| [rom.rom_error_est](rom.rom_error_est.qmd#skrom.rom.rom_error_est) | Compute and visualize ROM error metrics for flat data reconstructions. |
| [rom.rom_utils](rom.rom_utils.qmd#skrom.rom.rom_utils) | Utilities for ROM workflows. |

## DEIM Hyper-Reduction

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [rom.deim.bilinear_form_hyperrom_deim](rom.deim.bilinear_form_hyperrom_deim.qmd#skrom.rom.deim.bilinear_form_hyperrom_deim) | DEIM-based hyperreduction for finite element bilinear forms. |
| [rom.deim.linear_form_hyperrom_deim](rom.deim.linear_form_hyperrom_deim.qmd#skrom.rom.deim.linear_form_hyperrom_deim) | DEIM-based hyperreduction for finite element linear forms. |
| [rom.deim.deim](rom.deim.deim.qmd#skrom.rom.deim.deim) | Discrete Empirical Interpolation Method (DEIM) for nonlinear ROM acceleration. |
| [rom.deim.deim_o](rom.deim.deim_o.qmd#skrom.rom.deim.deim_o) | Discrete Empirical Interpolation Method (DEIM) for nonlinear ROM acceleration. |

## ECM Hyper-Reduction

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm](rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm.qmd#skrom.rom.ecm.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecm) | ECM-based hyperreduction for finite element bilinear forms. |
| [rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm](rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm.qmd#skrom.rom.ecm.linear_form_hyperrom_ecm) | ECM-based hyperreduction for finite element linear forms. |
| [rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method](rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.qmd#skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method) |  |
| [rom.ecm.helpers](rom.ecm.helpers.qmd#skrom.rom.ecm.helpers) | Helper utilities for ECM-based hyperreduction. |
| [rom.ecm.train_ecm](rom.ecm.train_ecm.qmd#skrom.rom.ecm.train_ecm) |  |

## ECSW Hyper-Reduction

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [rom.ecsw.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecsw](rom.ecsw.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecsw.qmd#skrom.rom.ecsw.bilinear_form_hyperrom_ecsw) | ECSW-based hyperreduction for finite element bilinear forms with element clustering. |
| [rom.ecsw.linear_form_hyperrom_ecsw](rom.ecsw.linear_form_hyperrom_ecsw.qmd#skrom.rom.ecsw.linear_form_hyperrom_ecsw) |  |
| [rom.ecsw.custom_nnls](rom.ecsw.custom_nnls.qmd#skrom.rom.ecsw.custom_nnls) | Implements bounded non-negative least squares (NNLS) for Empirical Cubature Subset Weighting (ECSW). |
| [rom.ecsw.hyperreduce](rom.ecsw.hyperreduce.qmd#skrom.rom.ecsw.hyperreduce) | Implements the end-to-end hyper-reduction pipeline combining randomized SVD and bounded NNLS. |

## Problem Classes

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [problem_classes.masterclass](problem_classes.masterclass.qmd#skrom.problem_classes.masterclass) | Static reduced-order modeling (ROM) framework. |
| [problem_classes.masterclass_parallel](problem_classes.masterclass_parallel.qmd#skrom.problem_classes.masterclass_parallel) | Parallel implementation of master_class using multithreading for snapshot generation and ROM evaluation. |

## Templates

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [templates.problem_template.bilinear_forms](templates.problem_template.bilinear_forms.qmd#skrom.templates.problem_template.bilinear_forms) |  |
| [templates.problem_template.linear_forms](templates.problem_template.linear_forms.qmd#skrom.templates.problem_template.linear_forms) |  |
| [templates.problem_template.params](templates.problem_template.params.qmd#skrom.templates.problem_template.params) |  |
| [templates.problem_template.domain](templates.problem_template.domain.qmd#skrom.templates.problem_template.domain) |  |
| [templates.problem_template.problem_def](templates.problem_template.problem_def.qmd#skrom.templates.problem_template.problem_def) |  |
| [templates.problem_template.properties](templates.problem_template.properties.qmd#skrom.templates.problem_template.properties) |  |

## Utilities

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [utils.imports](utils.imports.qmd#skrom.utils.imports) | The `utils` package aggregates frequently used libraries and helper routines for the pyHyperRom framework: |
| [utils.hdf5_store](utils.hdf5_store.qmd#skrom.utils.hdf5_store) | hdf5_arraylist.py |
| [utils.save_h5](utils.save_h5.qmd#skrom.utils.save_h5) | hdf5_arraylist.py |
| [utils.reduced_basis.svd](utils.reduced_basis.svd.qmd#skrom.utils.reduced_basis.svd) |  |
| [utils.dynamics.integrators](utils.dynamics.integrators.qmd#skrom.utils.dynamics.integrators) |  |

## Visualization

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [utils.visualization.color_palette](utils.visualization.color_palette.qmd#skrom.utils.visualization.color_palette) |  |
| [utils.visualization.generate_vtk](utils.visualization.generate_vtk.qmd#skrom.utils.visualization.generate_vtk) | VTK export utilities. |
| [utils.visualization.generate_vtu](utils.visualization.generate_vtu.qmd#skrom.utils.visualization.generate_vtu) |  |
| [utils.visualization.plot_utils](utils.visualization.plot_utils.qmd#skrom.utils.visualization.plot_utils) |  |
| [utils.visualization.vtuwriter](utils.visualization.vtuwriter.qmd#skrom.utils.visualization.vtuwriter) |  |

## Command Line Interface

| | |
| --- | --- |
| [cli](cli.qmd#skrom.cli) |  |
